name: Gmail
description: Draft replies, search inbox, summarize threads
longDescription: Bring your inbox into BrowseCortex. The AI can search messages, summarize long threads, draft replies in your voice, and label or organize mail—without leaving the page you're on.
author: BrowseCortex
examplePrompts: Summarize the unread threads in my inbox
Draft a polite reply declining this meeting
Find every email from my landlord this year
What did the support team say in the last thread?
